About me

Where strategy meets
technical depth

I'm a Senior Program & Cybersecurity Manager with deep roots in automotive E/E systems. My career spans global OEMs, Tier-1 suppliers, and consultancies — giving me a unique ability to operate at both governance level and deep in technical project delivery.

Currently serving as Engagement Manager and Interim Board Member at YARIX GmbH (formerly CYRES Consulting Services), I lead cybersecurity programmes across EMEA and the USA — driving client acquisition, CSMS lifecycle management, TARA facilitation, and cross-functional delivery.

Beyond execution, I built and scaled India operations from zero to a 20+ person team, held full P&L responsibility, and developed training programmes certifying professionals globally in partnership with TÜV Rheinland.

Based in Freising, Germany. English C1, German A2. Open to employment and consulting opportunities across Europe.
